title: MotionSpec
description: Formale Zwischensprache fuer Web-Motion. FROZEN v1 (ADR-0001, 2026-06-15). Field shape is the published, stable contract. specVersion "1.0" is stable; "0.1" was accepted for one deprecated minor cycle and is REMOVED at v1.2 (now rejected). Static contract; the dynamic check (Primitive-Allow-List, per-primitive params) is the Trust-Boundary-Validator in compiler/validate.js. responsive is a known-but-deferred key (rejected at runtime until a future minor).

catalogVersion.description: Optional reproducibility pin (ADR-0001 D2): the 16-char catalog hash this spec was authored against. Rejected at runtime if it does not match the loaded catalog.

pauseControls.description: WCAG 2.2.2 pause path for persistent (looping) motions. "auto" (default when omitted) injects a pause toggle; "api" emits only the CSS pause contract (data-ms-paused); "off" emits nothing (warned when persistent motions exist). Fail-safe like respectReducedMotion.

pauseLabels.description: Optional labels for the injected pause toggle (defaults: "Pause animations" / "Play animations").

primitive.description: Muss ein Name aus dem Primitive-Katalog sein. Allow-List, zur Laufzeit geprueft.
